name: @ursamu/mushcode
description: Parser, evaluator, linter, printer, and analyzer for MUX/RhostMUSH softcode.

tasks.build: npx peggy --format es --allowed-start-rules Start,LockExpr -o parser/mux-softcode.mjs grammar/mux-softcode.pegjs && npx peggy --allowed-start-rules Start,LockExpr -o parser/mux-softcode.js grammar/mux-softcode.pegjs
